ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "display_name" TEXT /* Display name of the user */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account is locked out */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES user_status ("status_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenants" (
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenant */,
  "tenant_name" TEXT /* Name of the tenant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tenant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tenant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tenant was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tenant (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the main contact person for the tenant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the main contact person for the tenant */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the main contact person for the tenant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "display_name" TEXT /* Display name of the device */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "ip_phone_model" TEXT /* Model of the IP phone */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language setting of the device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the device is assigned to */,
  "vlan_mode" TEXT /* VLAN mode (e.g., trunk, access) */,
  "vlan_id" INTEGER /* VLAN ID */,
  "vlan_priority" INTEGER /* VLAN priority */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  "last_config_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last configuration update */,
  "last_network_status_check" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last network status check */,
  "last_network_status" TEXT /* Current network status (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was assigned to the user */,
  "unassigned_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was unassigned from the user (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_vlan_mode FOREIGN KEY ("vlan_mode") REFERENCES vlan_modes ("vlan_mode_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_language FOREIGN KEY ("language") REFERENCES languages ("language_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES device_status ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_ip_phone_model FOREIGN KEY ("ip_phone_model") REFERENCES device_models ("model_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used for access (if applicable) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (e.g., city, country) from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the IP phone model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the IP phone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "firmware_versions" TEXT /* JSON array of supported firmware versions for the model */,
  "supported_languages" TEXT /* JSON array of supported languages for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vlan_modes" (
  "vlan_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each VLAN mode */,
  "vlan_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the VLAN mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the VLAN mode */,
  "default_vlan_id" INTEGER /* Default VLAN ID for the mode */,
  "default_vlan_priority" INTEGER /* Default VLAN priority for the mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vlan_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation of the status in the UI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation of the status in the UI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)
